name: Layered Tosada Bake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup skim milk at room temperature
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare a 12 x 7 x 2-inch baking dish with lightly cooking spray. Cook and stir turkey and onion in a skillet until the meat is brown. Stir in seasoning mix, tomato sauce, and beans. In a mixing bowl, combine baking mix, cornmeal, milk, egg white, and oil until moistened. Spread mixture in dish. Spoon meat mixture over dough. Mix remaining ingredients; spoon over meat mixture. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
